description_long: This is a rectangular dining table set made of dark wood, accompanied by six matching chairs. The tabletop features a subtle wood grain pattern, giving it a natural and elegant appearance. The chairs have straight backs with a rectangular cutout near the top and cushioned seats upholstered in a light, neutral fabric. The legs of both the table and chairs are straight and sturdy, providing stable support. The overall design is modern yet classic, suitable for communal dining or meeting spaces. The set is visually cohesive, with all components sharing the same wood finish and design language.
description: A dark wood rectangular dining table with six matching cushioned chairs, featuring a subtle wood grain pattern and modern, straight lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the table's short side with three chairs visible, highlighting the chair backs and the wood grain on the tabletop.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the table's long side with all six chairs lined up, emphasizing the uniformity and arrangement of the seating.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite short side with three chairs and the same wood grain pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing the long side with all six chairs, mirroring the arrangement seen in view 1.
